title: Nyabsolutely Random
description: A mod adding bunch of random and goofy blocks and items to the game with little to no real value
body:
Nyabsolutely Random adds a bunch of different mostly unrelated ~~garbage~~ useful things that came across my mind.

Some of the current features include:
- Posters
- Taters
- Glasses
  - Normal
  - Pink Glasses
  - Mexico Filter Glasses
  - Sunglasses
  - Upside Down Glasses
- Paper Bag Hat
- Thunder Stick
- Glass Sword
- Ban Hammer
